        negativeButton(text = negativeButtonText)
    }
}

Implemented improved “discard changes” dialogs with clearer actions:

- Updated `DiscardChangesDialog` to support custom button text + message (while keeping a compatibility overload).
- Switched affected screens (Add Note/NoteEditor, Deck Options, template editors, deck description editor) to use:
  - Positive: **Discard** (`R.string.discard`)
  - Negative: **Keep editing** (`TR.addingKeepEditing()`)
  - Message: backend translation (`TR.addingDiscardCurrentInput()`)
- Added new base string `discard` and updated the old prompt string text to “Discard current input?” for consistency.

Files changed:
- `AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/dialogs/DiscardChangesDialog.kt`

object DiscardChangesDialog {
    /**

    fun showDialog(
        context: Context,
        positiveMethod: () -> Unit
    ) = showDialog(

        positiveButtonText: CharSequence,
        negativeButtonText: CharSequence,
        message: CharSequence,
        positiveMethod: () -> Unit
    ) = AlertDialog.Builder(context).show {
        message(text = message)
        positiveButton(text = positiveButtonText) { positiveMethod() }
        negativeButton(text = negativeButtonText)
    }
}
